svg.text: MASTERY OF VOICE · AI-POWERED SANSKRIT PRONUNCIATION COACH
Recites shlokas · Hears AI feedback · Tracks progress
ErrorBoundary wraps entire tree · lazy import shlokas.json · sessionStorage scroll + filter persistence
llm.js — Backend proxy · X-Request-ID header · local fallback
makeRequestId() · spokenAlternatives · heuristic fallback on network error
Always works · no API key · no internet
Provider health tracker skips unhealthy nodes
700 verses · Sanskrit · Hindi · IAST · English · hard_sounds
Lazy-loaded via dynamic import() · CDN-cached · works offline
History (100 sessions) · SRS schedule · Streak · Settings
Bhashini API (free) · Google sa-IN · Sarvam AI
Authentic Sanskrit voice — replaces hi-IN browser TTS
SCALING COST BREAKDOWN · ALL PRICES USD/MONTH
At 1M users × ₹99/mo = ₹99M/mo revenue on ~₹165K infra · 99.8% gross margin · Bhashini TTS is free for Indian developers
Design principle: Provider abstraction layer → swap any AI service in 1 line · Static shlokas.json → zero content scaling cost · PWA = zero CDN cost
